mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id, p.title, p.slug, p.summary, p.cover_image, p.author_id, p.category_id, p.status, p.is_top, p.is_featured, p.allow_comment, p.create_time, p.published_time, c.category_id as c_category_id, c.name as c_name, c.slug as c_slug FROM blog_post p LEFT JOIN blog_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
